name: Natsuru Senou
description: __Height:__ 177 cm The series' main protagonist. Second year student of Seitetsu Gakuin High-school. He is chosen as a Blue Kämpfer by Moderator and setup as a Zauber type with power based on fire. In keeping with the rule that all Kämpfers are females, he turns into girl upon transformation. After a fight with Shizuku exposed his Kämpfer form to other students of the school, Shizuku arranged to have him enrolled in girl's class to fulfil public curiosity in a way that diverts attentions away fr

name: Ria
description: **Race:** High Elf Ria is the leader of a group of high-elf girls who wandered in the forest after their village was destroyed by humans in a war. They were homeless for 200 years until Tier brought them to Hiraku 's farm. Ria is a reliable construction enthusiast and contributes to the farm by establishing a smithy and bringing other technologies such as building construction and baking. After meeting Hiraku and his friends, Ria decides to live with them.

name: Risa Kanzaki
description: Mikako’s best female friend, Risa comes from Hokkaido and her dream is to design children’s clothes. She lives with her boyfriend Takeshi, a guitarist for a local band, and is Mikako’s biggest supporter as well as (later in the series) the mother of Arashi from Paradise Kiss.

name: Sayo Hitsugi
description: __Height:__ 169 cm A harsh nurse. Possesses tremendous physical strength and specializes in heavy weaponry.

name: Seung-Gil Lee
description: A figure skater from South Korea, Seung Gil is a stoic and calculating young man. He is generally emotionless, even during his programs, and only thinks about ice skating and improving his skills. Due to his handsome looks, he's very popular, especially with women, but pays no attention to his fans and often treats other people in a cold, detached manner. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Shia Kinou
description: Shia Kinou is one of the main protagonists in Meikyuu Black Company. She is a hero who is known for possessing The Philosopher's Stone by conquering The Fifth Floor of the dungeon.

name: Shino Sousaki
description: Telepath: This Quirk allows Shino to utilize a mental transmission and send telepathic messages directly into people's minds. Shino, has displayed the ability to send a message to tens of people at a time. She can send messages, but she can't receive them

name: Souji Okita
description: Captain of the first unit of the Shinsengumi. ~!Souji Okita is Humanity's representative in the tenth round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Toko Kuchiki
description: Very pretty on the outside. Mature. Her manner of speech doesn't fit her image. A mysterious girl who doesn't seem to really fit in anywhere. Possesses conflicting emotions about who she really is, and hires Reiji to find her "true self". She's the type of girl who's apt to do some outlandish things if the thought strikes her. (Source: vndb.org)

name: Tomoko Higashikata
description: She is the single mother of [Josuke Higashikata](https://anilist.co/character/13085/Jousuke-Higashikata). A single mother and teacher, Tomoko is known to show a strong temperament, disliking it when guys try to hit on her (as she still loves Joseph) and she gets annoyed quite easily. She also seems to be mildly perceptive, noticing that the seal on her milk that Angelo had given her was broken. Despite her sharp temperament, she is mostly a kind person, particularly to her family and friends.

name: Yua Nakabeni
description: Yua is an honor student who is great at sports. Although she doesn't speak that much, she has excellent communication skills. She has long back hair and black eyes. Yua loves cosplay and posts her images in costumes on social media. Ren follows her profile. Likes 30 denier tights (sheer).

name: Yui Ikari
description: Ikari Shinji's mother and wife of Gendou Ikari. ~!In the rebuild series, her maiden name is Yui Ayanami.!~ ~!While testing an early version of the Eva control system, she was absorbed into the unit. Her data is the basis of the Rei "replicas."!~

name: Chitose Kaginoji
description: Apparently, [Tsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/131106/Tsukasa-Yuzaki) saved her from falling off a cliff when they were children. Chitose wants to use her own life for the sake of [Tsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/131106/Tsukasa-Yuzaki) to pay her back. She obviously doesn't want [Tsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/131106/Tsukasa-Yuzaki) falling into [Nasa](https://anilist.co/character/130944/Nasa-Yuzaki)'s hands. She has two maids: [Aurora](https://anilist.co/character/137516/Aurora

name: Elena
description: A maid at the Voynich Hotel.

name: Elijah Ballard
description: The son of the famous drug lord Enoa Ballard, Elijah and the rest of his family is soon swept along on waves of trouble due to their father's antagonism towards Propater. Only nearly eluding capture by Propater agents, Elijah starts his journey being on the run from his father's enemies, but soon return to rescue his mother and sister from their captors. Starting out as a naive child, Elijah soon experience the harshness of the world first hand, and if the world is cruel, then he too, must be.

name: Elisabeth
description: __Race:__ Vampire Elisabeth is one of the three monarchs of the Lawless City and the Queen of Vampires. (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Emet-Selch
description: The main antagonist of Final Fantasy XIV: Shadowbringers and the narrator of Final Fantasy XIV: Endwalker . He is an Ascian working to bring about the Rejoining.

name: Frederica Greenhill
nativeName: フレデリカ・グリーンヒル
description: Frederica Greenhill first met Yang during the evacuation of El Facil. She joined the military to find him again and was assigned as his adjutant.

name: Haruka Kasugano
description: __Height:__ 170 cm The protagonist of the series. With a gentle appearance and slim profile, in many ways Haruka is the splitting image of his fraternal twin sister Sora. Personable and honest, he forges lasting friendships with remarkable ease. Haruka copes with the loss of his parents with a stout heart, burdened with the knowledge that the future of his delicate sister depends on him. As a result, he has a tendency to dote on his sister and worry about her constantly. He cannot swim either. T
